hero.subtitle: Share a dream. Receive its symbolism decoded and its vision rendered as an ethereal portal.

input.label: Describe Your Dream
input.placeholder: I was floating through a cathedral of mirrors, each reflection showing a different version of myself reaching toward a luminous door...
